plan.description: Upload the provided template to Google Drive and convert it to Google Docs format

inputs.placeholders: {"USER_NAME": "John Smith Doe", "CONTENT": "UST is a global provider of digital technology and transformation, IT services and solutions. Founded in 1998, the company is headquartered in California and operates across Americas, EMEA, and Asia-Pacific regions."}
